page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, resulting in 8 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

A key feature of this server is its bundled local storage, consisting of a 1919 GB SSD. This local solid-state drive is integrated directly with the instance, making it suitable for high-throughput data access. The network configuration provides a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps, and the virtual machine runs on the KVM hypervisor.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and the substantial local SSD storage, this instance offers high resource density for memory-bound and storage-intensive applications. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring high-speed local data caching or relational databases without the overhead of network-attached storage. Appropriate workloads include transactional databases, caching layers, data analytics, and general-purpose applications requiring a balance of memory and fast local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.2xlarge is an x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor, powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz. It provides 8 dedicated vCPUs with a single thread per core and 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB RAM-to-core ratio. A defining feature of this instance is its integrated 1919 GB local SSD storage, which is bundled directly with the hardware profile. The network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps. This resource configuration makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads. It is qualitatively optimized for database hosting, data caching, and analytical processing where high local storage capacity and memory density are required to minimize latency.

tagline: An x86 server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing, high memory density, and integrated high-capacity local SSD storage.

Equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
